holdings.infoBox: QEMM is an equity ETF with a total of 841 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 6.93%, RUSSIAN RUBLE at 5.98%, MediaTek at 3.42%, Delta Electronics at 2.58%, and Samsung Electronics at 1.87%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR MSCI Emerging Markets StrategicFactors ETF (QEMM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI EM Factor Mix A-Series index. The fund tracks an index of emerging-market securities equally-weighted between 3 sub-indexes that focus on value, minimum volatility and quality. QEMM was launched on Jun 4, 2014 and is issued by State Street.
